     front door, not a second copy of the doctrine (Law 6). Existing per-family content
     migrates to pointer-only surfaces only when touched - never big-bang. -->

# StarCar - Copilot CLI arrival

Start at the neutral front door: [`ONBOARDING.md`](../ONBOARDING.md). It carries what StarCar
is, the tiered reading path, and the compliance floor for every agent family.

**Compliance floor (one line):** end every report with the `starcar-artifact` envelope echoing
your brief's minted id as `task-id`; cars commit locally and never push; honest-stop on a
brief/code contradiction; TDD red-first; verify with exact counts and SHAs. Full detail in
`ONBOARDING.md`.
